title: bidens camporum
intro: Bidens camporum, also known as hairy beggartick or tickseed coreopsis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Bidens camporum has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Bidens camporum can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or salves, making it a valuable natural resource for promoting overall health and well-being.
